    What is the refresh icon?
    A refresh icon typically consists of a circular arrow, often with a curved design, symbolizing the action of reloading, updating, or resetting content or data within an application or webpage.

    A refresh icon typically consists of a circular arrow, often with a curved ...

    What is the refresh key?
    F5 key or refresh option in the browser. Refreshes the current page or window.
